title: Circle Receives Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
dek: Circle received final approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency for a national trust bank. The charter is described as a first of its kind for a major stablecoin issuer. It places the roughly $73 billion in USDC under direct federal supervision.
author: Crypto Cronkite
key_fact: Circle secured final OCC approval for a national trust bank charter, bringing about $73B in USDC under direct federal supervision.
body: Circle has received final approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to operate a national trust bank, according to multiple outlets. The approval is characterized as a first-of-its-kind federal banking charter for a major stablecoin issuer.
The charter places approximately $73 billion in USDC under direct federal supervision. Reporting also noted movement in Circle's stock following the announcement.
